parameters.query: SELECT id, opp_title, agency, naics_code, set_aside, gda_score, gda_label, incumbent_analysis, eligible_vehicles, estimated_value FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, opp_title, agency, govtribe_id FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE id = $1
SELECT id, opp_title, agency, naics_code, set_aside, eligible_vehicles, gda_score, govtribe_id FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE id = $1
SELECT t.id, t.opp_title, t.agency, t.naics_code, t.set_aside, t.likely_competitors, t.incumbent_analysis, t.gda_score, t.gda_label FROM gda_opportunity_tracker t WHERE t.id = $1

parameters.jsCode:
const row = $input.first().json || {};
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', module: 'contact_intelligence', opp_id: row.id, opp_title: row.opp_title, agency: row.agency, govtribe_id: row.govtribe_id, contacts: [], guidance: 'Contact data requires GovTribe Search_Contacts with referenced_govtribe_ids filter. Use the govtribe_id from this opp to query POCs (COR, CO, PM, KO). GovTribe provides name, email, phone, title, organization.' } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, opp_title, agency, dept, naics_code, set_aside, gda_score, gda_label, estimated_value, response_deadline, stage, incumbent_analysis, eligible_vehicles, likely_competitors, govtribe_id, ai_analysis FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE id = $1
